name: Prestigious Schulich Leader Award Recipient
description: Top 100 STEM students in Canada — recognized for leadership, initiative, and building impactful engineering solutions.

name: Biomedical Engineering Scholarship Recipient
organization: McEwen Family Entrance Award in Biomedical Engineering
description: Awarded entrance scholarship for demonstrating academic achievement, leadership and entrepreneurial initiative in the field of biomedical engineering.

name: Ingenious+ Regional Winner
description: Received a $1,000 grant for my mind-controlled drone project.

name: Speaker on Youth in Tech
description: As someone with a deep passion in building projects, I shared my own journey into STEM from building self-stabilizing spoons to brain-controlled keyboards. Shared how companies, CEOs, and other disruptors in tech can support youth growth.

name: WISE UCalgary Research Award
description: I was awarded the WISE Research Award, receiving a $1,000 scholarship for my summer research project on smarter agriculture. I am proud to be one of only ten students selected from across Calgary to receive this honor.

name: FIRST Robotics Competition Interview
description: Featured in a CTV News interview and article for my work in community outreach and STEM education as part of the Sparkans Robotics Team, representing Calgary at an international robotics competition.

name: 10x Future Founder Award
description: I was awarded a $1,000 scholarship for the 10X Future Founders Award, recognizing my passion for tech, innovation, and entrepreneurship. This award supports my growth and connection within the Calgary tech community, offering valuable opportunities to engage with industry leaders and expand my knowledge.
